_readme: HOW TO ADD A NEW LANGUAGE:
2. Fill in the fields below (remove _readme and _field_docs keys)
3. Add 'your-language' to lang/index.json  <- the only other file to touch
- A relative path from the project root:  'lang/your-language/audio/words/fin.ogg'
- null  (disables the play button for that item)
Paired vowels (unrounded + rounded) should share the SAME h and b,
matching the standard IPA chart. The renderer places unrounded labels
to the left of the dot and rounded labels to the right automatically.
- Wikipedia phonology articles for most languages
- Record your own with Audacity and save as .ogg
label: Your Language

vowels._doc: Minimal example — copy and fill in for each vowel
